summary: iter232 testing complete. 13/13 backend tests passed. All new features verified: OpenAI TTS endpoints (/api/echo-voice/tts and /tts-base64) work with sage voice (default), return audio/mpeg >20KB, validate voice param (400 for invalid), validate text length (422 for >4000 chars). EchoEvents CRM endpoints verified: /report returns definite/pending/summary/generated_at, /summary returns stages. Events lifecycle CRUD works: list/create/get/advance. Frontend: Voice panel opens, 4 suggestion buttons present, mic button present, Claude responds with speech + explanation + graph_spec, GraphSpec component renders inline SVG bar chart correctly.

issues: echo-cmd-launcher overlay intercepts clicks on Echo Mini Button - requires JS hide or force=True to bypass. This is a pre-existing issue from previous iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: GraphSpec component handles negative values and zero baseline correctly - good implementation
TTS fallback to browser SpeechSynthesis is properly implemented in EchoMiniButton.tsx speak() function
Voice panel properly stops both OpenAI audio and browser TTS on close
test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend writes. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter232_* events for lifecycle CRUD testing (auto-cleaned by test prefix convention).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter232 OpenAI TTS + GraphSpec fully tested. Backend: POST /api/echo-voice/tts returns audio/mpeg with Content-Type header, >20KB for HD audio, default voice=sage, validates voice param (400 for invalid like 'robot'), validates text max_length=4000 (422 for longer). POST /api/echo-voice/tts-base64 returns JSON {ok:true, format, voice, audio_base64} with base64 len>100. EchoEvents: GET /api/echo-events/report returns {definite:[], pending:[], summary:{}, generated_at}. GET /api/echo-events/summary returns {stages:{}, total_events}. Events lifecycle: POST /api/events/lifecycle creates with stage=prospect, phase=1. POST /api/events/lifecycle/{id}/advance with target_stage=qualified works. Frontend: EchoMiniButton.tsx speak() function calls /api/echo-voice/tts with {text, voice:'sage', model:'tts-1-hd'}, plays audio via Audio() element, falls back to browser SpeechSynthesis on error. GraphSpec component (lines 730-823) renders inline SVG bar/line charts from Claude's graph_spec response. Supports negative values, zero baseline, multi-series with legend. data-testid='voice-graph-{i}' for each chart.
